name: Frappe/ERPNext Federated Bridge
description: Permission-scoped Frappe/ERPNext tools with federated OAuth identity. Every read and write executes as the paired Frappe user; Frappe remains the only authorization authority. The pack owns Frappe context induction so the main Muster binary stays light: site URL plus API token, or one-time admin login credentials, can discover installed apps/modules and combine live metadata with Frappe, ERPNext, and Frappe Suite docs.
status: v0: loads through the capability-pack loader (HC-012). frappe_identity_resolve, frappe_semantic_data_resolve_lite, and frappe_records_create are implemented as pure {fetch, config}-context tools with exact Frappe error passthrough; remaining gateway tools are still planned.
